CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
INSERT INTO TEST_XMLS VALUES (3, XMLType('<oil-rig xml:id="14a_01" water="0.413"/><oil-rig xml:id="14b_01" water="0.402"/>'));
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getCLobVal() AS ENAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//poname').getCLobVal() AS PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/pono');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//@xml:id').getCLobVal() AS XML_ID FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/oil-rig');

SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename/text()').getCLobVal() AS ENAME, e.XMLVAL.extract('//pono/text()').getCLobVal() AS PONO FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp') OR e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//name').getCLobVal() AS PROJECT_NAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/project');

SELECT DISTINCT e1.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getCLobVal() AS ENAME, e2.XMLVAL.extract('//poname').getCLobVal() AS PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e1, TEST_XMLS AS e2 WHERE e1.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp') AND e2.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getCLobVal() AS EMP_NO FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp') AND e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getCLobVal() IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('//oil-rig[@xml:id="14b_01"]');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//manager[text()="Jane"]').getCLobVal() AS MANAGER FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/project');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//duration').getCLobVal() AS DURATION FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/project') AND e.XMLVAL.extract('//name[text()="ProjectX"]').getCLobVal() IS NOT NULL;
